live-provider-anthropic-oauth.description: anthropic provider live run needs Claude Max OAuth in the macOS keychain (useClaudeOauth:true, no API key). Required only when AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1 enables the anthropic matrix case; absent => that provider case skips (not fails).
live-provider-anthropic-oauth.how_to_provide: Sign in to Claude Code so the OAuth token is in the login keychain (Claude Max); or export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Then set AGENT_MCP_LIVE=1.
